name: Kalyani Dhokarikar
profileSummary: Kalyani Dhokarikar, also known as Kalyani Umbrani, is an Indian former international cricketer. She represented India as an all-rounder, batting right-handed and bowling right-arm fast-medium. During her 18 year cricketing career, she represented India in eight One Day Internationals and one Test match, between 1995 and 2000.
